_comment: Example captured lab run: the decisions a real AWS oracle recorded while attempting the paths a randomized lab produced. 'fallback' is what reality answered for any assertion not listed (here: allowed). Keys are Assertion.Key() = kind|principal|action|resource. The 'denied' entry is the honest signal - AWS blocked an escalation the engine surfaced (an SCP the engine does not evaluate), which becomes a refuted verdict in the calibration flywheel.

iam|role|iam:*|admin.evidence: SimulatePrincipalPolicy: implicitDeny (SCP restricts iam:* in this OU)

network|vm|tcp:connect|db.evidence: probe host not deployed in this lab
